auditConclusion.staticInflationRisk: Mostly controlled. Only a small group of true static includes remains, and most are legitimate always-on feats. The main risks are duplicate rows, a wrong speed target, stale false numeric modifiers, and bogus defense reroll metadata.
needsImmediateReview: Point-Blank Shot / Point Blank Shot duplicate

safeAlwaysOnStaticRows.name: Predictive Defense
safeAlwaysOnStaticRows.conditionSummary: Predictive Defense now changes Reflex Defense ability selection instead of using a fake attack modifier.

safeAlwaysOnStaticRows.name: Martial Arts II
safeAlwaysOnStaticRows.conditionSummary: Always-on Reflex Defense dodge bonus; unarmed damage portion is handled by rule hooks.

safeAlwaysOnStaticRows.name: Martial Arts I
safeAlwaysOnStaticRows.conditionSummary: Always-on Reflex Defense dodge bonus; unarmed damage/no-AOO portions are handled by rule hooks.

safeAlwaysOnStaticRows.name: Martial Arts III
safeAlwaysOnStaticRows.conditionSummary: Always-on Reflex Defense dodge bonus; unarmed damage portion is handled by rule hooks.

safeAlwaysOnStaticRows.name: Resilient Strength
safeAlwaysOnStaticRows.conditionSummary: Use the better of Strength or Constitution modifier for Fortitude Defense.

safeAlwaysOnStaticRows.name: Force of Personality
safeAlwaysOnStaticRows.conditionSummary: Force of Personality now changes Will Defense ability selection instead of using a fake attack modifier.

safeAlwaysOnStaticRows.name: Deep Sight
safeAlwaysOnStaticRows.conditionSummary: Rule grants a persistent capability or movement/sense mode.

safeAlwaysOnStaticRows.name: Thick Skin
safeAlwaysOnStaticRows.conditionSummary: Always-on species bonus to Fortitude Defense.

safeAlwaysOnStaticRows.name: Improved Defenses
safeAlwaysOnStaticRows.conditionSummary: Always-on +1 to Fortitude, Reflex, and Will.

suspectRows.name: Fast Swimmer
suspectRows.whySuspect: The description says Swim Speed increases by 2 squares, but the enabled modifier targets speed.base. If consumed literally, it can increase all base speed instead of swim speed.
suspectRows.recommendation: Retarget to a swim-speed/movement-mode rule, or display as a swim-only capability; do not change land/base speed.
suspectRows.benefit: Gain a bonus to your Swim Speed.

enabledModifiers.description: Migrated from flag AE: Fast Swimmer

suspectRows.name: Elusive Target
suspectRows.whySuspect: Benefit redirects missed melee attacks while fighting defensively/total defense; current enabled modifier is +2 to generic defense with melee predicates. That is not the described rule and could alter defense math.
suspectRows.recommendation: Disable/remove the numeric modifier and convert to action/reaction metadata or GM-managed redirect note.
suspectRows.benefit: When fighting defensively or using the total defense action, you may redirect missed melee attacks to another target adjacent to you.

suspectRows.name: Deceptive Drop
suspectRows.whySuspect: Benefit is a surprise-round/prone rider comparing attack roll to Fortitude Defense; current enabled modifier is +2 attack vs prone, which is unrelated.
suspectRows.recommendation: Disable/remove the attack modifier and convert to rider metadata: on surprise-round damage vs flat-footed target, compare attack total to Fortitude + size modifier to knock prone.

suspectRows.name: Grand Army of the Republic Training
suspectRows.whySuspect: The rule depends on currently equipped armor, armor Fortitude equipment bonus, and proficiency. Metadata says static_actor/include and requiresRuntimeContext false, even though DefenseCalculator may consume it correctly.
suspectRows.recommendation: Change metadata to equipped_armor_context/contextual_static and requiresRuntimeContext true so generic static engines cannot treat it as unconditional Will Defense.
suspectRows.benefit: If you wear Armor that provides an Equipment bonus to your Fortitude Defense, and you are proficient with that Armor, you also apply the Armor's Equipment bonus to your Will Defense.

suspectRows.name: Sure Climber
suspectRows.whySuspect: The description grants climb speed only when not distracted or threatened; metadata exposes a persistent climb speed capability. This is probably OK as a note, but could be wrong if displayed as always active.
suspectRows.recommendation: Keep out of static combat speed totals; display as conditional movement/capability note or GM-adjudicated when distracted/threatened.
suspectRows.benefit: Gain a Climb Speed of 4 squares.

suspectRows.name: Scion of Dorin
suspectRows.whySuspect: This feat appears to be a conditional defense bonus, not a reroll feat, but abilityMeta.defenseRerolls is present. If a resolver exposes this, the player could get an unauthorized reroll.
suspectRows.recommendation: Remove defenseRerolls for this feat. Keep the conditional defense modifier/rule only, gated by the stated context.
suspectRows.benefit: Gain a bonus to Fortitude Defense against Atmospheric Hazards.

enabledModifiers.description: Scion of Dorin: +5 species bonus to Fortitude Defense against natural/atmospheric hazards.

defenseRerolls.description: +5 species bonus to Fortitude Defense against natural/atmospheric hazards.

suspectRows.name: Point-Blank Shot
suspectRows.whySuspect: Feat name collides after normalization with: Point Blank Shot, Point-Blank Shot. Duplicate feat rows can appear twice in progression and may allow duplicate selection or double-applied roll options.
suspectRows.recommendation: Pick one canonical row, merge any missing metadata/description, then hide/deprecate/delete the duplicate from chargen selection.
suspectRows.benefit: You get a +1 bonus on attack and damage rolls with ranged weapons against opponents within Point-Blank Range.
